ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Work class of the individual */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight of the individual for census calculations */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the individual */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Numeric representation of education level */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to household head */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gain of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital loss of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week by the individual */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the individual */,
  "income" TEXT /* Income bracket of the individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "years_with_employer" INTEGER /* Number of years with current employer */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass FOREIGN KEY ("workclass") REFERENCES work_classes ("workclass_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_income FOREIGN KEY ("income") REFERENCES income_brackets ("income_bracket"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES educations ("education_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race FOREIGN KEY ("race") REFERENCES races ("race_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_native_country FOREIGN KEY ("native_country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("status_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_classes" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work class */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the work class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Corresponding numeric representation */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study for the education level */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry related to the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_brackets" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income bracket */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Description of the income bracket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capital_gain_loss" (
  "capital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the capital record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gain amount */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital loss amount */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capital_gain_loss_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hours_worked" (
  "hours_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the hours record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked per week */,
  "overtime_hours" INTEGER /* Number of overtime hours worked per week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hours_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hours_worked_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., login, data retrieval) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device during access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_access ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the validation rule */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "columns_affected" TEXT /* Columns affected by the validation rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation log */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validation rule applied */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date and time of validation */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the validation (pass or fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_logs_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES data_validation ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_access ("user_id")
)
